oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Safety on farms is a team sport - How can you help create a culture of safety?
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Brihn, Auguste
Spangler, Conrad
Bender, Jeff
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: health and safety
One Health
occupational safety
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Farming is a dangerous occupation. Veterinarians are a key partner in creating health and safety teams on livestock op­erations. In this presentation, you will appreciate some of the potential hazards, ways to identify and prevent injuries, and resources to create a more safe work environment for you, your clients and farm workers.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; No. 1 (2026): 2026 Recent Graduate Conference Proceedings; 3-4
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
